17: #[derive(Error, Debug)]
18: pub enum WasmPluginError {
19:     #[error("Failed to compile WASM module: {0}")]
20:     CompileError(String),
21:     #[error("Failed to instantiate WASM module: {0}")]
22:     InstantiationError(String),

24:     ExportNotFound(String),
25:     #[error("WASM trap: {0}")]

33: pub struct WasmPluginInstance {
34:     instance: Instance<'static, WasmContext>,
35:     store: Store<WasmContext>,
36:     init_func: Option<TypedFunc<(i32, i32, i32), i32>>,
37:     process_func: TypedFunc<(i32, i32), i32>,

46: impl WasmPluginInstance {
47:     pub fn from_wasm_bytes(wasm_bytes: &[u8], name: &str) -> Result<Self, WasmPluginError> {
48:         let engine = Engine::default();
49:         let module = Module::new(&engine, wasm_bytes)
50:             .map_err(|e| WasmPluginError::CompileError(e.to_string()))?;
51: 
52:         let mut store = Store::new(&engine, WasmContext::default());
53: 
54:         let init_func: Option<TypedFunc<(i32, i32, i32), i32>> = {
55:             let f = module.get_typed_func::<(i32, i32, i32), i32>(&store, "ox_plugin_init")?;
56:             f.ok()
57:         };
58: 
59:         let process_func = module.get_typed_func::<(i32, i32), i32>(&store, "ox_plugin_process")
60:             .map_err(|e| WasmPluginError::ExportNotFound(e.to_string()))?;
61: 
62:         let error_func: Option<TypedFunc<(i32, i32), ()>> = {
63:             let f = module.get_typed_func::<(i32, i32), ()>(&store, "ox_plugin_error")?;
64:             f.ok()
65:         };
66: 
67:         let destroy_func: Option<TypedFunc<i32, ()>> = {
68:             let f = module.get_typed_func::<i32, ()>(&store, "ox_plugin_destroy")?;
69:             f.ok()
70:         };
71: 
72:         let memory = module.get_memory(&store, 0);
73: 
74:         let instance = Instance::new(&mut store, &module, &[])
75:             .map_err(|e| WasmPluginError::InstantiationError(e.to_string()))?;
76: 
77:         let capabilities = None;
78: 
79:         Ok(Self {
80:             instance,
81:             store,
82:             init_func,
83:             process_func,
84:             error_func,
85:             destroy_func,
86:             memory,
87:             name: name.to_string(),
88:             capabilities,
89:             context_data: Mutex::new(HashMap::new()),
90:         })
91:     }
92: 
93:     pub fn init(&self, config_json: &str, _api: &CoreHostApi) -> Result<i32, WasmPluginError> {
94:         let Some(init_func) = self.init_func else {
95:             return Err(WasmPluginError::InitFailed);
96:         };
97: 
98:         let config_ptr = self.copy_string_to_wasm(config_json)?;
99:         let api_ptr = 0i32;
100:         let version = OX_WORKFLOW_ABI_VERSION as i32;
101: 
102:         let result = init_func.call(&mut self.store.store_context_mut(), (config_ptr, api_ptr, version))?;
103: 
104:         self.free_wasm_string(config_ptr);
105: 
106:         if result == 0 {
107:             return Err(WasmPluginError::InitFailed);
108:         }
109: 
110:         Ok(result)
111:     }
112: 
113:     pub fn process(&self, plugin_ctx: i32, task_ctx: i32) -> Result<FlowControl, WasmPluginError> {
114:         let result = self.process_func.call(&mut self.store.store_context_mut(), (plugin_ctx, task_ctx))?;
115: 
116:         let code = match result {
117:             0 => FLOW_CONTROL_CONTINUE,
118:             1 => FLOW_CONTROL_END,
119:             2 => FLOW_CONTROL_ERROR,
120:             3 => FLOW_CONTROL_JUMP,
121:             4 => FLOW_CONTROL_SKIP,
122:             _ => FLOW_CONTROL_CONTINUE,
123:         };
124: 
125:         Ok(FlowControl {
126:             code,
127:             payload: std::ptr::null(),
128:         })
129:     }
130: 
131:     pub fn error(&self, plugin_ctx: i32, task_ctx: i32) {
132:         if let Some(err_func) = self.error_func {
133:             let _ = err_func.call(&mut self.store.store_context_mut(), (plugin_ctx, task_ctx));
134:         }
135:     }
136: 
137:     pub fn destroy(&self, plugin_ctx: i32) {
138:         if let Some(destroy_func) = self.destroy_func {
139:             let _ = destroy_func.call(&mut self.store.store_context_mut(), plugin_ctx);
140:         }
141:     }
142: 
143:     fn copy_string_to_wasm(&self, s: &str) -> Result<i32, WasmPluginError> {
144:         let Some(memory) = self.memory else {
145:             return Ok(0);
146:         };
147: 
148:         let bytes = s.as_bytes();
149:         let len = bytes.len() + 1;
150: 
151:         let alloc_func: Option<TypedFunc<i32, i32>> = {
152:             let f = self.instance.get_typed_func::<i32, i32>(&self.store, "alloc")?;
153:             f.ok()
154:         };
155: 
156:         if let Some(alloc) = alloc_func {
157:             let ptr = alloc.call(&mut self.store.store_context_mut(), len as i32)
158:                 .map_err(|e| WasmPluginError::Trap(e))?;
159: 
160:             memory.write(&mut self.store, ptr as usize, bytes);
161:             memory.write(&mut self.store, ptr as usize + bytes.len(), &[0]);
162: 
163:             Ok(ptr)
164:         } else {
165:             Ok(0)
166:         }
167:     }
168: 
169:     fn free_wasm_string(&self, ptr: i32) {
170:         if ptr == 0 { return; }
171: 
172:         let free_func: Option<TypedFunc<i32, ()>> = {
173:             let f = self.instance.get_typed_func::<i32, ()>(&self.store, "dealloc")?;
174:             f.ok()
175:         };
176: 
177:         if let Some(free) = free_func {
178:             let _ = free.call(&mut self.store.store_context_mut(), ptr);
179:         }
180:     }
181: }
